targets.query: SELECT mean("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT last("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(15m) fill(previous)
SELECT last(mean) + 10 * last(derivative) FROM (SELECT mean("value_mmol"), DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(15m) fill(previous))
SELECT last(mean) + 20 * last(derivative) FROM (SELECT mean("value_mmol"), DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(15m) fill(previous))
SELECT last(mean) + 30 * last(derivative) FROM (SELECT mean("value_mmol"), DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(15m) fill(previous))
SELECT (last(mean) - 4.0) / -last(derivative) FROM (SELECT mean("value_mmol"), DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(15m) fill(previous))
SELECT max("value_mmol") - last("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT 100 * (max("value_mmol") - last("value_mmol")) / max("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(previous)
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(previous)
SELECT count("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter AND "value_mmol" < 4.0 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT count("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter AND "value_mmol" < 4.5 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT count("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter AND "value_mmol" > 10.0 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(previous)
SELECT min("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT max("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 5m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(previous)
SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(previous)

SELECT count("derivative") FROM (SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(previous)) WHERE "derivative" < -0.0555 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)

SELECT count("derivative") FROM (SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(previous)) WHERE "derivative" < -0.111 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)

SELECT count("derivative") FROM (SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(previous)) WHERE "derivative" > 0.0555 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)

SELECT count("derivative") FROM (SELECT DERIVATIVE(mean("value_mmol"), 1m) FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(previous)) WHERE "derivative" > 0.111 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT mean("value_mmol") FROM "glucose" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(5m) fill(previous)
